title: RF Link Evaluation Board
subtitle: Layout in progress; board for RF telemetry path evaluation, power measurement, and CM5-based logging
stackup: Four-layer RF and mixed-signal PCB stackup to be finalized from Altium exports
summary: An RF link evaluation board for LoRa and telemetry characterization, including switched RF paths, directional-coupler power measurement, detector telemetry, current sensing, and CM5 logging. Layout is in progress and will be updated with exported layer renders.
mainConstraints: Maintain controlled-impedance RF feedlines and clean return paths
Keep coupler and detector ranges bounded for expected transmit power
Separate RF, power, and digital logging regions
Provide clear test access for VNA, spectrum, power, and telemetry validation
publicNote: Layout is in progress. Add exported copper SVGs, screenshots, and RF measurement evidence as the board matures.

model3d.title: RF Link Evaluation Board 3D Model
model3d.description: Add the Altium STEP export under content/projects/rf-link-evaluation-board/model.
